name: Md. Hadiuzzaman Bappy
about: After completeing my college education, i admitted to Khulna University as a Computer Science Student. During those years, I have tried to learn a variety of things. In which, Developing and Designing attracted me mostly. I have done so many frontend work both on web and mobile platform. I have also done some qualitiful brand idendity designing. Later designing and developing intrigued me to have enthusiasm to become a Product designer.Also known as User Interface(UI)/ User Experience(UX) designer.
